changelog: v2.5.6: Undo v2.5.5's mistaken 'skip on home' logic — Strategy 5 always runs. Broaden draft input detection to isEditable() (catches WhatsApp's custom subclasses). Dumps now go 15 levels deep (was 10 — was cutting off right before the chat content). Timeout snapshots now list every editable node + every clickable image button with bounds, so the actual send button on your phone is visible in the log.
